title: DA rails against salary hikes
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The DA in Knysna has voted...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The DA in Knysna has voted against “greedy” salary increases for councillors, passed at a special council meeting on Friday 25 October, without the concurrence of MEC for local government Anton Bredell.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The DA in Knysna has voted against “greedy” salary increases for councillors, passed at a special council meeting on Friday 25 October, without the concurrence of MEC for local government Anton Bredell."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sharon Sabbagh, the DA Knysna caucus chief whip and spokesperson on finance, said the “greedy” salary increases were voted for by the ANC/PA/PBI/EFF coalition-led council “to implement substantial salary increases for councillors effective from 1 July 2024, which includes a nearly R1m annual remuneration for executive mayor Aubrey Tsengwa”.","html":"Sharon Sabbagh, the DA Knysna caucus chief whip and spokesperson on finance, said the “greedy” salary increases were voted for by the ANC/PA/PBI/EFF coalition-led council “to implement substantial salary increases for councillors effective from 1 July 2024, which includes a nearly R1m annual remuneration for executive mayor Aubrey Tsengwa”."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'Financial crisis'","html":"'Financial crisis'"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sabbagh said the DA “strongly condemns this decision, at a time when the municipality is suffering a severe financial crisis, an inability to deliver basic services, and a backlog of critical, unfilled vacancies that undermines the daily lives and wellbeing of Knysna’s residents”.","html":"Sabbagh said the DA “strongly condemns this decision, at a time when the municipality is suffering a severe financial crisis, an inability to deliver basic services, and a backlog of critical, unfilled vacancies that undermines the daily lives and wellbeing of Knysna’s residents”."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more about the story in this weeks' edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald.","html":"Read more about the story in this weeks' edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
